title: Silverline 633711 Hard Cap Gel Knee Pads Adjustable, Black
features: EVA foam and gel inner for reduced compression and comfort
Neoprene hook and loop lower strap
description: From the manufacturer About Us As an ISO 9001 accredited company, they always take quality seriously. Recognised and trusted throughout the UK and Europe, their products are quality checked to ensure they deliver tools that comply with the very latest standards in quality and safety. The compliance team are also responsible for their factory audit programme involving the comprehensive review of working conditions and ethical business practice at every factory manufacturing their products. Silverline 633711 Hard Cap Gel Knee Pads Adjustable Knee pads with pre shaped flexible plastic caps for protection and mobility. Eva foam and gel compress less with use when compared with standard foam, and give good comfort for longer. Heavy duty polyester body. Neoprene lower strap with convenient hook and loop fastening for quick adjustment. Good for flooring and other DIY.
